hero.subline: Personally guided. Transparent. Precisely tailored to your business.

benefits.label: Our Benefits
benefits.headline: Why SkylineSites?
benefits.subline: We deliver more than just websites – we deliver digital experiences that drive your business forward.

items.title: Personal Support
items.desc: No ticket system, no support bot. You always have a direct point of contact.

items.title: Transparent Fixed Prices
items.desc: No hidden costs. You know from the start what your project will cost.

items.title: Fast Delivery
items.desc: Your project goes live within 2–4 weeks. No months of waiting.

items.title: Tailored to You
items.desc: No off-the-shelf templates. Every website is individually crafted for your business.

services.headline: What We Do for You
services.subline: From first idea to finished website – everything from one source.

items.desc: Your website gets found on Google. We optimize for maximum visibility.

items.desc: Perfect display on all devices – smartphone, tablet and desktop.

points: Individual solutions instead of generic templates

process.label: Our Process
process.headline: Step by Step to Your Website
process.subline: A clear, structured process – so you always know where we stand.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.desc: We get to know each other. You describe your vision, we listen and ask the right questions.

steps.title: Concept & Offer
steps.desc: We develop a tailor-made concept and present you with a transparent fixed-price offer.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: We create a unique design that fits your brand. You give feedback, we optimize.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Your design becomes a fully functional website – mobile optimized and SEO-ready.

steps.title: Review & Launch
steps.desc: Joint acceptance, final touches, then your website goes live.

steps.title: Support & Maintenance
steps.desc: Even after launch, we're here for you. Updates, adjustments, extensions – we stay your partner.

about.label: About Us
about.headline: Personal. Passionate. Digital.
about.text1: SkylineSites was founded with a clear mission: to give small and medium-sized businesses the digital presence they deserve – without big agency overhead, hidden costs, or communication chaos.
about.text2: We believe every business deserves a professional website. That's why we offer personal support, clear processes and fair prices – so you can focus on your business.

pricing.label: Our Packages
pricing.headline: Transparent Prices. No Surprises.
pricing.subline: Choose the package that fits your business. Everything included, everything clear.

plans.name: One-Pager
plans.desc: Ideal for individuals, freelancers and small businesses with a clear offering.

plans.name: Business Website
plans.desc: For established businesses that need a professional multi-page presence.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: For complex projects with special requirements – we develop exactly what you need.

addons.label: Add-ons
addons.headline: Extend Your Package
addons.subline: All the extras that make your website even more powerful.

items.title: Google My Business
items.desc: Setup & optimization of your GMB profile

items.name: Thomas M.
items.text: Finally a website I'm proud of! The collaboration was straightforward, the price fair and the result exceeded all my expectations.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.text: Within 2 weeks I had a beautiful website. I regularly get compliments from my clients about it!

items.name: Marcus R.
items.text: Very professional, punctual and the result speaks for itself. Since then I've had significantly more inquiries through my website.

items.name: Lisa W.
items.text: The personal support was the best part. I was always kept up to date and my wishes were implemented perfectly.

items.name: Peter H.
items.text: Fast, affordable, top quality. What more could you ask for? My new website has already brought me several new clients.

items.q: How long does it take to create my website?
items.a: A one-pager is usually ready within 14 days. A business website within 21 days. For enterprise projects, we discuss the timeframe individually.

items.q: What is included in the prices?
items.a: Our packages include design, development, mobile optimization, basic SEO and setup. All included services are transparently listed in the respective package table.
No. You receive a fixed-price offer before the project starts. Additional costs only arise if you consciously book additional services.

items.q: Can I edit my website myself later?
items.a: Yes! We build your website so that you can adjust simple content yourself. On request, we set up a user-friendly CMS.

items.q: What do you need from me to get started?
items.a: Ideally your logo, desired colors, texts and images. If not yet available, we help you create them – optionally as an add-on service.

items.q: Do you also handle hosting and domain?
items.a: We are happy to advise you on choosing the right hosting and can recommend where to best set up your domain and server. Direct management is with you.
After launch, we optionally offer a maintenance contract for updates, backups and support. You can also commission minor adjustments at any time.

items.q: Do you also work with existing clients?
items.a: Yes! Whether redesigning an existing website or adding new features – we're happy to help with existing projects too.
